vocab.example: To alleviate the boredom of sitting in stationary traffic, I often listen to narrated short stories.
When the cars are moving at a snail's pace, I find it's the perfect time to practice my mindfulness breathing.
It can be incredibly testing, but I always try to keep my cool instead of venting my frustration on the horn.

vocab.meaning: giao thông dày đặc (xe nối đuôi sát nhau)
vocab.example: During bumper-to-bumper traffic, I usually switch on the radio to stay updated on the latest news bulletins.

vocab.meaning: giết thời gian (làm gì đó cho mau hết giờ)
vocab.example: I tend to kill time by observing the interesting architecture or people around me while the road is blocked.
